BulletHit: Either shooter or victim must be a player for this event to be recorded right now, but if there is interest in AI vs AI hits we can implement that
DamageDealt.ordnanceOdf: undefined for environmental damage (water, other unknown sources)
PickupPowerup: This detects pod and crate pickups
PickupPowerup.picker: if an AI picks up the powerup this is undefined
PickupPowerup.powerupTeam: the team that owns the powerup
PlayerState.hasTarget: are they using the T key?
StatHeader.shutdownRequested: this is true if the stat session was cancelled via mission script or console command, otherwise false if the game ended normally
UnitDestroyed.killer: undefined if killer was not a player
UnitDestroyed.victim: undefined if victim was not a player
UnitSniped: Shooter and undefined if they are not players, this is probably rare but it might occur in mods that use sniping ai, or projectiles that are sniper shells with travel time (shooter might be dead)
